parsed.answer: Claude Code does not have a rich set of named color themes. The interface inherits terminal colors. There may be a light/dark mode toggle.

claims.statement: Claude Code does not have a rich multi-theme system with many named themes
The interface appearance is primarily driven by the terminal emulator color scheme
There is no dedicated slash command for switching named color themes
A light/dark mode distinction may exist

parsed.uncertainty_notes: No reliable specific knowledge of theme system.
